summary: Plan-only live PR inventory shard. No shared canonical was provided or inferred; all five hydrated open PRs are non-security items with distinct scopes, so no close, merge, fix, or label mutation is recommended.

actions.reason: Distinct draft maintainer-owned automation/logging PR with failing proof; keep it out of dedupe closeout for maintainer follow-up.
Distinct draft build PR with its own linked issue context; not a duplicate or low-signal closeout candidate for this inventory shard.
Distinct draft gateway compatibility PR; no hydrated evidence supports duplicate, superseded, low-signal, or fixed-by-candidate closure.
Large maintainer-owned docs PR with passing checks but no inventory-level closure basis; keep independent for normal maintainer review.

Useful contributor bug-fix PR with supplied proof and passing checks; preserve contributor credit and keep it independent for maintainer technical review rather than closing or replacing in this plan.
